summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the 4-theme system (Magical Glow, Bedtime, Pixar Bright, Parchment). All theme features tested: switcher visibility, dropdown, per-theme color changes, localStorage persistence, authenticated navbar, and app navigation integrity.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Login/Register AuthPage does not include a ThemeSwitcher component in its own header - not a bug, theme persists via localStorage, but users can't switch theme while on auth pages. Low priority enhancement.

Minor: Body background-color uses CSS variable `--background` but `.theme-page-bg` gradient class is on a wrapper div - this means if the wrapper div is somehow missing, body will fall back to `bg-background` color. Current implementation is robust.
Code quality: ThemeContext, ThemeSwitcher, and index.css are all well-structured and modular. No issues found.
seed_data_creation: Registered test account: theme_test_1771690478@test.com for authenticated navbar testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4-theme system fully tested and working. All themes (magical/bedtime/pixar/parchment) switch correctly via data-testid='theme-switcher-trigger' and 'theme-option-{id}'. localStorage persistence confirmed. ThemeSwitcher present in both LandingPage header and authenticated Navbar. Auth pages (login/register) accessible and functional. No bugs found.

theme_test_results.bedtime_theme: PASS - dark navy #0B1426 background, amber buttons
theme_test_results.pixar_theme: PASS - sky blue #e0f7ff background, vibrant colors
theme_test_results.parchment_theme: PASS - warm cream #fdf6e3 background, sepia tones
